body:
(Deprecated, Please use [UMD](https://modrinth.com/mod/umd))
# **DESCRIPTION**

**SQ’s Railway Decoration Mod (SRDM)** is a lightweight Minecraft decoration mod focused on enhancing railway-themed builds with simple yet immersive 1x1 decorative blocks. Ideal for creative players and builders, the mod currently includes a growing collection of aesthetic elements such as signs, props, and platform details, with future updates planned to add fences, railings, and other structural decorations. SRDM is purely visual—no functional mechanics—making it the perfect choice for enhancing the atmosphere of your train stations, depots, and transit environments.

🔹 Focused on 1x1 decorative blocks

🔹 Adds realistic railway-themed blocks

 🔹 Perfect for creative mode and modded railway builds

🔹 Planned additions: fences, railings, and more

🔹 Works great with mods like **[MTR](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraft-transit-railway)**
